posts.author: jenshire (Jen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The ability to add recurring items to a quotes and invoices template. As well as Quantities.

What are you trying to achieve

We bill multiple clients monthly, with recurring charges. It would be nice to be able to either duplicate an invoice, or set up a template with the 8 things we bill recurring, and then add to as needed vs having to create a new invoice with every item every month.
